# Bankruptcy Discharge Bars -- When You Can't Get Relief [2026]
> What blocks a bankruptcy discharge? Prior filings, fraud, concealment, and bad faith under Sections 727 and 1328. Check your eligibility -- free 2026 guide.

## About
dischargebar.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- All Bankruptcy Discharge Bars Timing Chart: https://dischargebar.org/all-bars-chart.html
- Discharge Bar Calculator -- When Can I File Again?: https://dischargebar.org/calculator.html
- Chapter 13 Discharge: Completing Your Plan -- Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-13-discharge.html
- Chapter 13 to Chapter 13 -- The 2-Year Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-13-to-13.html
- Chapter 13 Then Chapter 7 -- The 6-Year Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-13-to-7.html
- Chapter 7 Discharge: Timeline and What Gets Eliminated -- Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-7-discharge.html
- Chapter 7 Then Chapter 13 -- The 4-Year Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-7-to-13.html
- Chapter 7 to Chapter 7 -- The 8-Year Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/chapter-7-to-7.html
- Bankruptcy Discharge Bars -- When You Can't Get Relief: https://dischargebar.org/
- Debts That Survive Bankruptcy: The Complete List -- Discharge Bar: https://dischargebar.org/nondischargeable-debts.html
- Discharge Bar FAQ -- Waiting Periods Between Bankruptcy Filings: https://dischargebar.org/frequently-asked-questions.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
